definition: unique identifier of the substance group

definition_ml.en: unique identifier of the substance group

note: Unique ID which includes an identity name and the authorizing body for the identity name.

note_ml.en: Unique ID which includes an identity name and the authorizing body for the identity name.

remark: An example for the unique ID of a substance group is the ID number that is specified with the declarable substance group entry in the IEC 62474 database. This is only applicable to declarable substance groups that are listed in IEC 62474 database.

remark_ml.en: An example for the unique ID of a substance group is the ID number that is specified with the declarable substance group entry in the IEC 62474 database. This is only applicable to declarable substance groups that are listed in IEC 62474 database.
